author: lOrm
content: Closing as tracked-future-roadmap-not-active-bug. install_from_marketplace_with_policy (#249 Phase 1) is implemented and the unit-level verify_signature tests are green (28 tests in validate.rs). The five proposed manager-level integration tests are a quality-uplift increment, not a defect — no signature-enforcement bug is documented, just additional coverage. Re-file under a focused testing label when the team has slack for it.
